skill.name: ask-user
skill.description: Ask the user one focused question with optional multiple-choice answers to gather information interactively

skill.name: find-docs
skill.description: Retrieves up-to-date documentation, API references, and code examples for any developer technology.

skill.name: brainstorming
skill.description: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior.
